info.title: Kimi Code WebSocket API
info.description: WebSocket protocol for Kimi Code daemon control frames, acknowledgements, system frames, and session event streaming.

client_hello.name: client_hello
client_hello.title: Client Hello
client_hello.summary: Start a client session and optionally subscribe to existing daemon sessions.

subscribe.name: subscribe
subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.summary: Subscribe the connection to one or more session event streams.

unsubscribe.name: unsubscribe
unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.summary: Remove one or more session event stream subscriptions.

watch_fs_add.name: watch_fs_add
watch_fs_add.title: Watch Fs Add
watch_fs_add.summary: Add filesystem watch paths for a subscribed session.

watch_fs_remove.name: watch_fs_remove
watch_fs_remove.title: Watch Fs Remove
watch_fs_remove.summary: Remove filesystem watch paths for a subscribed session.

abort.name: abort
abort.title: Abort
abort.summary: Abort a running prompt in a session.

terminal_attach.name: terminal_attach
terminal_attach.title: Terminal Attach
terminal_attach.summary: Attach this connection to a terminal stream.

terminal_detach.name: terminal_detach
terminal_detach.title: Terminal Detach
terminal_detach.summary: Detach this connection from a terminal stream.

terminal_input.name: terminal_input
terminal_input.title: Terminal Input
terminal_input.summary: Write raw input bytes to a terminal.

pong.name: pong
pong.title: Pong
pong.summary: Reply to a server ping with the same nonce.

server_hello.name: server_hello
server_hello.title: Server Hello
server_hello.summary: Initial server greeting sent immediately after the socket opens.

ping.name: ping
ping.title: Ping
ping.summary: Heartbeat ping sent by the server; clients must answer with pong.

resync_required.name: resync_required
resync_required.title: Resync Required
resync_required.summary: Signals that a client must rebuild local session state from REST history.

error.name: error
error.title: Error
error.summary: Server-side WebSocket protocol or runtime error.

session_event.name: session_event
session_event.title: Session Event
session_event.summary: Session-scoped agent event envelope; frame type is the payload event type.
